steps.title: Find the week two population
steps.content:
The population starts at $950$ and increases by $130$ bees per week for the first $2$ weeks:
$$
950+2(130)=1{,}210
$$

steps.title: Model the later weeks
steps.content:
For $w>2$, there are $w-2$ additional weeks, each adding $170$ bees. The population at the end of week $w$ is
$$
1{,}210+170(w-2)=1{,}210+170w-340
$$
$$
1{,}210+170(w-2)=870+170w
$$

steps.title: Subtract from the goal
steps.content: The number of bees still needed is the goal minus the modeled population: $$ 2{,}450-(870+170w)=1{,}580-170w $$ The answer is C.
